notes: Coway is the strongest R12 recurring-service candidate, but Stage 3 waits for account, churn, ARPU, OPM, and FCF evidence.
Agri machinery export and autonomy themes are attention evidence; Green requires sell-through, inventory, financing, OPM, and FCF.
Medical-quota policy can move education stocks, but Stage 3 needs company-level students, repeat course revenue, ARPU, and OPM.
Classroom device policy is double-edged; use it as routing or RedTeam evidence until company revenue and margin impact are visible.
Bird-flu import restrictions can create short MFE, but easing can quickly fade the event premium.
Regulated cash flow can support Stage 2 watch, but volume decline, HNB competition, and regulation must be checked before Stage 3.
Smart-farm policy and AI agriculture narratives stay Stage 1 until commercial installations, orders, service revenue, and unit economics are visible.
